name: front-desk-app

scripts.test:e2e: echo 'E2E UI tests removed; run npm run test for unit tests'
scripts.prod: npm run prod:init && npm run install:web && npm run prod:start
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && electron-builder && npm run verify:electron-pack
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm prune --omit=dev && npx --yes electron-builder@24.13.0 --win --x64 && npm run verify:electron-pack
scripts.dist:ci: npm prune --omit=dev && npx --yes electron-builder@24.13.0 --win --x64 && npm run verify:electron-pack
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && npm prune --omit=dev && npx --yes electron-builder@24.13.0 --mac dmg --arm64 && npm run verify:electron-pack
scripts.dist:mac:arm64:ci: npm prune --omit=dev && npx --yes electron-builder@24.13.0 --mac dmg --arm64 && npm run verify:electron-pack
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && npm prune --omit=dev && npx --yes electron-builder@24.13.0 --mac dmg --x64 && npm run verify:electron-pack
scripts.dist:mac:x64:ci: npm prune --omit=dev && npx --yes electron-builder@24.13.0 --mac dmg --x64 && npm run verify:electron-pack
scripts.dist:mac:universal: npm run build && npm prune --omit=dev && npx --yes electron-builder@24.13.0 --mac dmg --arm64 --x64 && npm run verify:electron-pack
scripts.dist:mac:universal:ci: npm prune --omit=dev && npx --yes electron-builder@24.13.0 --mac dmg --arm64 --x64 && npm run verify:electron-pack

author: Matt Barbour
description: Front Desk App - Guest Self Check-in System
